title: Piece of String
tagline: VR photogrammetry piece — follow a string through a real home and the memories left behind

what.content: An architectural dreamscape rendered at home. Follow a piece of string through this real house, and explore the emotions and memories that people leave behind in the spaces they inhabit.

why.content: This work questions the way a space can affect you when you're not in it, or when it's gone. When the only record of it is a digital representation that you can step into only through a VR headset, or on a computer screen. Does it evoke the same emotions? What does it mean if the answer is yes?

how.content: I used photogrammetry to capture the space with a DSLR, thousands of photos, and manual post-processing in VR. Photogrammetry scans captured on DSLR and processed in Reality Capture. Meshes cleaned in VR in Oculus Medium. Models decimated and compiled in Blender
All of these steps lead to a full 3D model of the space, which you can view (and interact with) here!
